title: Unique Dutch Penne Pasta
description: A tender, fermented Dutch-inspired penne pasta that pairs crispy tempeh with a vibrant, caramelized spinach sauce, perfect for a sugar‑free date night.
instructions: Cook penne pasta in salted boiling water until al dente, about 8 minutes, then drain and set aside.
While pasta cooks, heat olive oil in a stone bowl dolsot over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger, sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Toss in cubed fermented tempeh and cook until lightly browned, about 4 minutes.
Stir in fermented soy sauce, apple cider vinegar, and a pinch of salt, letting flavors meld for 2 minutes.
Add chopped spinach and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Remove the pot from heat and stir in chopped green onions and sesame seeds for a fresh finish.
Serve the sauce over the drained penne, garnishing with an extra sprinkle of sesame seeds if desired.
